resources.string: Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Do I need root access to use AmnShield AppControl?
A: No! AmnShield AppControl uses the Android VPN service to monitor and control internet traffic without requiring root access. This makes it safer and easier to use.
Q: Is my data safe and private?
A: Yes. AmnShield AppControl is open source, contains no tracking, and all data is processed locally on your device. We do not collect or send any personal information to external servers.
Q: Can I use AmnShield AppControl with other VPN apps?
A: No. Android does not allow running multiple VPN services simultaneously. You must disable other VPN apps or VPN profiles to use AmnShield AppControl.
Q: How do I know which apps have internet access?
A: Check the color indicators next to each app. Green/Teal = access allowed, Red/Orange = access denied. Tap an app to see detailed access information.
Q: Can I allow an app only on Wi-Fi?
A: Yes. You can set different rules for Wi-Fi and mobile networks. Tap the Wi-Fi and mobile icons separately for each app to configure this.
Q: What is Blacklist vs Whitelist mode?
A: Blacklist (default) allows all apps except those you block. Whitelist blocks all apps except those you allow. Choose based on your preference in Settings.
Q: Why is the app using battery?

A: The firewall needs to run continuously to monitor and control network traffic. However, it\'s optimized for minimal battery impact and can actually save battery by blocking unnecessary background connections.
Q: Can I see what data apps are sending?
A: Yes. Enable detailed logging in Settings to see all network connections. Export logs to analyze traffic in detail.
Q: What if the app crashes or doesn\'t respond?
A: Try restarting the app or your device. Check Settings to ensure everything is configured correctly. Report issues with detailed information if the problem persists.
Q: Is AmnShield AppControl free?
A: Yes. AmnShield AppControl is completely free and open source. All features are available at no cost.
Q: How do I uninstall AmnShield AppControl?
A: Simply uninstall like any other app. The VPN connection will be automatically disabled. All settings and logs will be removed.
Q: Can I export my logs?
A: Yes. Go to Settings and look for Export/Backup options to save your logs and configuration for analysis or backup purposes.
